commentary_text: The market prices Bosnia and Herzegovina to win at 66%, while the model estimates 46%—a 20-percentage-point gap favoring the home favorite. The market also compresses Qatar's chances to 14% against the model's 23%, a 9-point tightening. This sharpening of conviction could reflect recent lineup news, injury updates, or current form that the model's last update did not capture; such information might have shifted real-money flows toward Bosnia and Herzegovina or away from Qatar. The dashboard flags this divergence as a signal worth monitoring rather than a resolution of which forecast is more reliable.
